english: What the hell? They got to main power!
chinese: 搞什么鬼？它们把主电源弄断了！
扫描仪显示无异常。它们走了。

english: Corporal Kane, Voss wanted me to give you this Strogg nailgun. I bet it can sure rip the shit out of a squib.
chinese: Kane 下士，Voss 让我把这把 Strogg 钉枪交给你。我敢说这玩意儿准能把杂碎撕个稀烂。

english: This is no place to let your guard down. C'mon, let's see if we can't find my group up ahead - Badger squad.
chinese: 这地方可不敢放松警惕。走，看看能不能在前头找到我的队伍——猛獾小队。

english: I heard the dropship you Rhinos were on took a direct hit. You're lucky to still be breathing.
chinese: 听说你们犀牛小队坐的运输船被直接命中了。你还能喘气，算是走大运了。

english: We lost a lot of drop ships during the initial landing. The Strogg air defense cannons ripped us apart.
chinese: 首轮登陆我们损失了不少运输船。Strogg 的防空炮把我们打得七零八落。

english: But now it our turn right? It's time to kick some Strogg ass.
chinese: 不过现在轮到我们了，对吧？是时候去揍扁那帮 Strogg 了。

english: Sorry, Sarge. I had a run-in with a Strogg. And I met this Marine from Rhino squad.
chinese: 抱歉，中士。我半路跟一个 Strogg 干了一架，还碰上了这位犀牛小队的陆战队员。

english: We're clear. Why don't you go find your squad.
chinese: 安全了。你去找你的小队吧。

english: Kane, we're done here. Go find Lt. Voss.
chinese: Kane，这边完事了。去找 Voss 中尉吧。

english: You're Rhino squad? Take that door and it'll get you to your squad.
chinese: {puzzled}你是犀牛小队的？{idle}走那扇门，就能找到你的小队。

english: Seal it! Seal the damn window now!
chinese: 封上！马上把那扇该死的窗户封上！

english: Where the hell did that come from?
chinese: {confused}那玩意儿到底是从哪儿冒出来的？

english: Don't know. But we better inform the Sarge.
chinese: 不知道。不过最好向中士报告一声。

english: Sarge, we got movement on the scanner.
Scanner's clean. Whatever it was, it's gone.
chinese: 扫描仪没有异常。不管刚才是什么，已经不见了。

english: Wait here. Jones, you take point.
Hey! Hey, Corporal Kane! Get over here on the double!
chinese: 嘿！嘿，Kane 下士！跑步过来，快点！

english: Corporal Kane, Lieutenant Voss said you'd be riding with us. Hop on up and we'll get going.
chinese: Kane 下士，Voss 中尉说了你搭我们的车。上来吧，这就出发。

english: All right, Doyle. Get this shit heap moving.
chinese: 好了，Doyle，把这堆破铜烂铁开起来。

english: You got any idea how far into Strogg territory these convoys are goin?
chinese: 你知道这些车队要往 Strogg 的地盘里开多深吗？

english: Far enough that youre gonna have to be fluent in Strogg if you wanna ask for directions.
chinese: 深到你要是想问个路，就得会说一口流利的 Strogg 语。

english: Guess we better not get lost, huh?
chinese: 看来咱们最好别迷路，是吧？

english: Kane here was with the squad that took that cannon out.
chinese: 这位 Kane，就是端掉那门炮的小队里的人。
真的假的？干得漂亮，士兵。

english: We got nothin to worry about  Rhino squad is here. Right, Kane?
chinese: 咱们没啥好担心的——犀牛小队在这儿呢。对吧，Kane？

english: Yeah, you boys have pulled off all sorts of impossible shit, havent you?
chinese: 是啊，你们这帮小子什么不可能的破事都干成过，不是吗？

english: Theyre still talkin about what Rhino did in Dallas, during the Earth invasion.
chinese: 大伙儿到现在还在念叨地球入侵战那会儿，犀牛小队在 Dallas 干的那一票。

english: Cut the chatter, gentlemen, and keep your eyes wide. Theres reports of Strogg in this area.
chinese: 少闲聊，各位，眼睛都放亮点。有报告说这一带有 Strogg 出没。

english: Have you heard how things are going along the front?
chinese: 你听说前线的战况了吗？

english: Same as usual. Soldiers are fightin and dyin and neither sides winnin.
chinese: 老样子。弟兄们打着、死着，两边谁也赢不了。

english: The thing is though, we cant keep this battle up much longer. Weve got to win it soon or were just gonna run out of men.
chinese: 可问题是，这场仗我们撑不了多久了。必须尽快赢下来，不然人手就要打光了。

english: And thats exactly why these convoys are going out - to tip the scales in our favor.
chinese: 而这正是派出这些车队的原因——把天平扳向我们这边。

english: Our guys are really cleaning up the fliers since you blew up the hangars, Kane.
chinese: {happy}自打你把机库炸了，咱们的人收拾起飞行器来那叫一个痛快，Kane。

english: This is Walker 12 of Bison squad. Got a bogie at 6 oclock.
chinese: 这里是野牛小队 Walker 12。六点钟方向发现不明目标。

english: You can get off, Kane. This is your stop.
Kane, youre assigned to Strauss. Voss out.
chinese: Kane，你被派给 Strauss 了。Voss 完毕。

english: All right. Convoy, move forward. Kane, get Strauss to the controls for Door 2.
chinese: 好了。车队，前进。Kane，带 Strauss 去 2 号门的控制台。

english: Lt. Voss, uh...what should we do?
chinese: Voss 中尉，呃……我们该怎么办？

english: Leave them alone, these repair bots are harmless.
chinese: 别理它们，这些维修机器人没有危害。

english: Harmless, huh? Get ready, we got company!
chinese: 没有危害是吧？准备好，有敌人来了！

english: Lieutenant, I can force this door open, but it will set off alarms.
chinese: 中尉，我可以强行打开这扇门，但那样会触发警报。

english: Ja, but I will need access to a wiring junction.
chinese: Ja，不过我需要接入一处接线箱。

english: Kane, help Strauss locate a wiring junction. Voss, out.
chinese: Kane，帮 Strauss 找一处接线箱。Voss 完毕。

english: Yes, let us walk around. All by ourselves. I am certain the Strogg won't mind.
chinese: 好啊，那我们就四处转转嘛。就我们俩。我敢肯定 Strogg 不会介意的。

english: Ja, this is what I need.
That's it! I just need a few minutes.
I've located the security wiring to Door 2.
chinese: 我找到通往 2 号门的安保线路了。

english: I've located the security wiring to Door 1.
chinese: 我找到通往 1 号门的安保线路了。

english: Now, I merely switch Door 2 security to look at Door 1.
chinese: 现在，我只要把 2 号门的安保切换去监视 1 号门就行了。

english: There, I'm done. Let's get back to the convoy.
chinese: 好了，完工。我们回车队吧。

english: All clear. Those repair bots must have warned the Strogg we were here. Kane, open the door 2. If there's anything on the other side, I want Strauss out of harm's way.
chinese: 安全。一定是那些维修机器人向 Strogg 报了信。Kane，去开 2 号门。万一那边有什么东西，我可不想让 Strauss 涉险。

english: Let's move it out, convoy. Strauss, stay on this side of the door in case we run into trouble.
chinese: 车队，出发。Strauss，你留在门这一边，免得我们碰上麻烦。

english: You're not gonna be able to. I'm sure security locked it.
chinese: 你打不开的。肯定是安保系统把它锁死了。

english: The sons of bitches knew we were coming.
chinese: 这帮混蛋早就知道我们要来。

english: Dont sweat it. Kane wont let me die . . . right, ol buddy?
chinese: 别担心。Kane 不会让我死的……对吧，老伙计？

english: Take positions! This zone is hot!
chinese: 各就各位！这里是交战区！

english: You go ahead and get Newberry to the door they need opened.
chinese: 你先走，把 Newberry 带到那扇要开的门那儿去。

english: Don't worry about us. We're stayin' right here.
chinese: 别担心我们，我们就守在这儿。

english: Rhino Squad, huh? You guys are supposed to be pretty badass.
chinese: 犀牛小队？听说你们都是狠角色。

english: Yeah, did Rhino really save Austin, back when the Strogg attacked Earth?
chinese: {puzzled}对了，当年 Strogg 打地球的时候，奥斯汀真是犀牛小队救下来的？

english: Just got orders from Lt.Voss. We're accompanying you to Sub-Entrance 1.
chinese: 刚接到 Voss 中尉的命令。我们陪你一起去 1 号副入口。

english: About damn time we get to frag some squibs.
chinese: 妈的，可算能宰几个杂碎了。

english: Let's get a move on. We're in Strogg territory.
chinese: 抓紧走吧，这里可是 Strogg 的地盘。

english: Come on. We've got orders to get to Sub-entrance 1.
chinese: 走吧。我们奉命前往 1 号副入口。

english: Let's go. Those engineers in Sub-Entrance 1 are waiting for us.
chinese: 出发。1 号副入口的工程兵还等着我们呢。

english: Stay quiet or the Strogg will hear us.
chinese: 保持安静，不然会被 Strogg 听见。

english: Let's get down to Sub-entrance 1 pronto.
chinese: 麻利点，赶紧下到 1 号副入口去。

english: We got our orders. Keep moving toward Sub-entrance 1.
chinese: 命令已经下了。继续朝 1 号副入口前进。

english: Hit that console and get the elevator up here now!
chinese: 快按那个控制台，把电梯升上来！

english: Damn. It's locked. Strauss, can you open this door?
chinese: 该死，锁住了。Strauss，这扇门你能打开吗？

english: Shit, did you see that? I thought I was dead meat.
chinese: {scared}妈的，你看见没？{idle}我还以为自己死定了。

english: The squibs are tryin' to psyche us out - and it's starting to work.
chinese: 那帮杂碎想吓垮我们——而且还真开始起作用了。

english: You can't take three steps around here without checkin' over your shoulder.
chinese: 在这地方走三步就得回头看一眼。

english: This hit and run bullshit by the freaks is getting to be real annoying.
chinese: 这帮怪胎打了就跑的把戏，真是越来越烦人了。

english: Just when I think the Strogg can't sink any lower I see shit like this.
chinese: 每次我以为 Strogg 已经烂到底了，就会看见这种玩意儿。

english: Is this what the Strogg have planned for all of us if they take over the Earth?
chinese: 要是 Strogg 占领了地球，这就是他们给我们所有人准备的下场吗？

english: Why? Why would the Strogg do this?
chinese: 为什么？Strogg 为什么要干出这种事？

english: Something about that gives me the creeps. Don't touch it.
chinese: 那东西看着就让我发毛。别碰。

english: Wish all our missions were this easy. Hey, what's that?
chinese: 要是每次任务都这么轻松就好了。嘿，那是什么？

english: I know a little about Strogg weaponry. Mind if I take a look at your rail gun?
chinese: 我对 Strogg 的武器略知一二。介意我看看你的轨道炮吗？

english: I just upped the field output by 300%. Now that rail gun is gonna really kick ass.  You'll be able to shoot straight through guys.
chinese: 我刚把力场输出调高了 300%。现在这把轨道炮可真有得瞧了——你能一枪把那些家伙打个对穿。

english: Thanks, Marine. I would have died.
chinese: 谢了，弟兄。差点就没命了。

english: I should have seen that one comin'.
Thanks for the assistance. He had me dead in his sights.
chinese: 多谢支援。刚才它已经死死瞄住我了。

english: Soldier, who's side are you on?
Do you know you just killed a Marine?
chinese: {furrow}你知道你刚杀了一名陆战队员吗？

english: You just fragged someone on our side!
Haven't you got something better to do?
Hold up, Marine. I'm a medic.
chinese: 站住别动，弟兄。我是医疗兵。

english: Stay right there. I'll give you a medpack.
chinese: 待在原地。我给你上个医疗包。

english: Don't move from there. I'll heal you.
Stay there, Kane. I'm a medic!
Don't move from there, Kane. I'll fix you up.
I'm comin' over to patch you up, Kane.
Kane, I'm a medic! Stay right where you are!
chinese: Kane，我是医疗兵！待在原地别动！

english: I only need a couple of seconds to patch you up.
chinese: 给我几秒钟就能把你包扎好。

english: All done. Go give 'em hell. Marine.
chinese: 搞定。去让他们好看吧，弟兄。

english: Finished! Now go kill some Strogg.
chinese: 完事了！去多杀几个 Strogg 吧。

english: Wait there, Kane. Ill fix your armor.
chinese: 在那儿等着，Kane。我来修你的护甲。

english: Hold up a second, Kane. I can repair your body armor.
chinese: 稍等一下，Kane。我能修好你的护甲。

english: If you wait there, I can fix your armor, Corporal Kane.
chinese: 你在那儿等着，我就能给你修护甲，Kane 下士。

english: Hold still while I fix this for you.
chinese: 我给你修的时候别乱动。

english: If you stop moving, Ill fix your body armor.
chinese: 你停下别动，我就帮你修好护甲。

english: Stop moving around while I repair your armor.
chinese: 我修护甲的时候你别来回晃。

english: Go on. Ive done all I can.
There you are. Get back in the battle.
One Marine's worth ten of you Strogg!
chinese: 一个陆战队员顶你们十个 Strogg！

english: Thanks, soldier. You saved my hide.
chinese: 谢了，士兵。你救了我一条命。

english: Another second and that Strogg woulda killed me. Thanks.
chinese: 再晚一秒，那 Strogg 就把我干掉了。多谢。

english: Yes! That's what I like to see!
Ha ha! He's not getting' up again!
chinese: 哈哈！他再也爬不起来了！

english: Confirm your target before pulling that trigger!
Point that weapon away from me!
Are you fully trained in the operation of that weapon, soldier?
chinese: {furrow}你那把枪的操作训练合格了吗，士兵？

english: What the hell are you doing shooting one of us?
Keep an eye to the left!
We've got hostiles to the right!
I've got a contact above us!

chinese: 觉得自己挺能打是吧，怪胎？

english: You're in the wrong place, squib!
Soldier, stay there! I'll fix you up.
chinese: 士兵，待在那儿！我来给你包扎。

english: Kane, hold up! Let me give you a medkit!
chinese: Kane，停一下！让我给你上个医疗包！

english: Stay there, Kane. I'm a medic!
Kane, I'll be right there to fix you up!
Wait a minute, Kane! I'll heal you.
Corporal, I'm a little preoccupied at the moment.
The more you move, the longer this takes.
Just give me a few seconds here.
That's as much as I can do.
That's as good as it gets.
chinese: 这已经是最好的效果了。
我们刚损失了一名队员！
我们的人一个接一个地倒！

english: And I'm getting' paid to do this!
chinese: 干这活儿居然还有钱拿！

english: Hey, nice shot. You sure saved my ass.
chinese: 嘿，好枪法。你可真救了我一条命。

english: Thanks for savin' me. Guess this makes you my guardian angel.
chinese: 多谢救命。看来你成我的守护天使了。

english: Thanks, Marine. I hope I can return the favor.
chinese: 谢了，弟兄。希望我能还你这个人情。

english: Yeah! That's the way to do it, Marine!
It's a pleasure to watch you work, Soldier.
chinese: 看你干活真是种享受，士兵。

english: Don't pull that trigger unless you're sure of your target!
Do not fire at me, Soldier!
Hey, moron, you just killed a Marine!
chinese: {furrow}嘿，蠢货，你刚杀了一名陆战队员！

english: I should have you thrown in the brig for that!
chinese: {furrow}就凭这个，我该把你扔进禁闭室！

english: Look, we got Strogg above us!
I'm gonna mess you up, freak!
Wait a minute! I'm a medic!
Don't go anywhere! I'll heal you up.
chinese: 哪儿也别去！我来给你治伤。

english: Stay there! I've got a medpack for you!
chinese: 待在那儿！我这有医疗包！

english: Kane, I'm a medic! Wait there!
chinese: Kane，我是医疗兵！在那儿等着！

english: I'm on my way, Kane! I've got a medpack for you!
chinese: 我这就来，Kane！医疗包给你备着呢！

english: Kane, stay put. I'll patch you up!
Wait right there, Kane! I'll try to fix you up.
chinese: 就在那儿等着，Kane！我来想办法治好你。

english: Gimme a few seconds and you'll be okay.
chinese: 给我几秒钟，你就没事了。

english: This is just what the doctor ordered.
I've done what I can. Go get 'em soldier.
chinese: 我能做的都做了。上吧，大兵。

english: All done. Now try and keep low, would ya?
chinese: 全好了。以后记得放低身子，成不？

english: That's it! Go frag some Strogg!
chinese: 好了！去痛宰 Strogg 吧！

english: Wait up, Kane, and I'll fix your body armor.
Just wait a second and I'll be done.
One minute and you'll be back in the battle.
chinese: 一分钟后你就能重返战场。

english: Hold still. I'll fix your armor.
There you go. Try to be a little more careful, all right?
chinese: 好了。下回当心着点，行吗？

english: That's all I can do. See you around, marine.
chinese: 我只能修成这样了。回见，陆战队员。

english: Finihed. Back into the war, marine.
chinese: 完工。回战场去吧，陆战队员。

english: Marine down! I repeat, Marine down!
chinese: 陆战队员倒下了！重复，陆战队员倒下了！
我们正被他们逐个点名！
他们刚干掉了一名队员！

english: I just kicked your ass, freak!

chinese: 你们 Strogg 屁都不值！

english: I should be dead right now. Thanks, Corporal.
chinese: 按理说我这会儿已经死了。谢了，下士。
我欠你个人情，陆战队员。

english: You do the Marine's proud, Soldier!
chinese: 你给陆战队长脸了，大兵！

english: Damn, Corporal. You got some skill with that weapon.
chinese: 好家伙，下士。你这枪法真有两下子。

english: Check your freakin' line of fire!
Damn it! You just shot me!
You just iced one of us!
Your friendly fire just killed a Marine!
chinese: {furrow}你的误伤刚打死了一个陆战队员！

english: You just killed a freakin' soldier!
We've got weapons fire in back!
Stay right there! I'll heal you!
Keep down! I'll be right there to patch you up!
chinese: 趴低点！我马上过来给你包扎！

english: Corporal Kane, don't move! I'll heal you up!
chinese: Kane 下士，别动！我来给你治伤！

english: I'm a medic, Kane. Stay there - I'll fix you up!
chinese: 我是医疗兵，Kane。待着别动——我这就来治你！

english: Hold up, Corporal Kane. I'm a medic!
chinese: 停一下，Kane 下士。我是医疗兵！

english: Stay at your position, Kane. I'll heal you.
Sorry, buddy. I'm a little busy.
Looks like you need a medpack.
chinese: 看样子你需要个医疗包。

english: Just stay put for a minute longer.
See? That didn't hurt a bit.
Go on. That's the best I can do.
chinese: 去吧。我只能治到这份上了。

english: Done. Now go ice some freaks, Marine!
chinese: 好了。去干翻几个怪胎吧，陆战队员！

english: That's it. You're back in action.
chinese: 行了。你可以重返战斗了。

english: Corporal Kane. Wait, and I'll repair your armor.
chinese: Kane 下士。等一下，我来修你的护甲。

english: I can fix your armor, Kane.
I'l have you patched up in no time.
chinese: 马上就给你修得妥妥的。

english: Just a few seconds and you'll be right back into the fight.
chinese: 就几秒钟，你马上就能重回战斗。

english: That's all I can do. Good luck.
chinese: 我只能做到这一步了。祝你好运。

english: There, finished. Now try to be more careful.
chinese: 好，修好了。以后多加小心。
刚有个陆战队员被干掉了！

english: The damn Strogg are wearin' us down!
chinese: 这帮该死的 Strogg 快把我们耗干了！

english: Shit, we just lost a man!
chinese: 妈的，我们又折了一个人！
他们又干掉了一个弟兄！

english: Now I gotta scrape you off my boots.
chinese: 完了我还得把你从靴底刮下来。

english: Is it any wonder I love the Corps?
chinese: 你说我能不爱陆战队吗？

english: Looks like you handle Strogg better than me. Thanks for helpin' me out.
chinese: 看来你对付 Strogg 比我在行。多谢帮我解围。

english: I bet he didn't like that at all.
chinese: 我敢打赌他可一点都不好受。

english: Shit. He ain't gettin' up from that.
chinese: 妈的，这下他别想爬起来了。

english: He looks pretty dead to me.
Always check your line of fire!
Stop shooting! I'm on your side!
Calm down, and stop shooting marines!
chinese: {furrow}冷静点，别再朝陆战队员开枪了！

english: We got Strogg on the left!
I hope you like pain, freak!
chinese: 但愿你喜欢吃苦头，怪胎！

english: Remain there, soldier! I've got a medpack!
chinese: 待在那儿，大兵！我有医疗包！

english: Stay put! I'll fix you up!
Corporal Kane, remain there! I'm a medic!
chinese: Kane 下士，待在那儿！我是医疗兵！

english: I've got a medpack for you, Corporal Kane.
chinese: Kane 下士，我这有医疗包给你。

english: Stay where you are, Kane. I'll heal you.
Corporal Kane, don't move. I'll be there with a medpack in a second.
chinese: Kane 下士，别动。我马上带医疗包过去。

english: Can't you find someone else to annoy?
Marine, you gotta remember to duck once in a while.
chinese: 陆战队员，你得记着时不时低头躲一躲。

english: One minute and you'll be fine.
chinese: 一分钟就好，你会没事的。

english: Finished. You're back in the war Marine.
chinese: 搞定。回战场去吧，陆战队员。

english: There you go. See you around.
There's not gonna be many of us left at this rate.
chinese: 照这么打下去，我们剩不了几个人。

english: The bastards fragged one of us!
chinese: 那帮混蛋干掉了我们一个弟兄！

english: Ha, ha! This is gettin' fun!
A shame you didn't live a little longer.
chinese: 可惜你没能多活一会儿。

english: Look at you all busted up, freak!
chinese: 瞧瞧你这稀巴烂的德行，怪胎！

english: Thanks, Corporal. You're a regular hero.
chinese: 谢了，下士。你真是个正儿八经的英雄。

english: That Strogg woulda fragged me if it weren't for you.
chinese: 要不是你，那 Strogg 早把我干掉了。

english: That Strogg didn't know what hit 'em!
chinese: 那 Strogg 到死都不知道自己怎么死的！
那 Strogg 彻底报废了。

english: What in hell are you doin'?
Stand down! That was a marine!
That was a human you iced!
Stay at your position! I'm a medic!
I've got a medpack for you!
Don't move, Marine! I'll fix you up!
chinese: 别动，陆战队员！我来治好你！

english: Corporal Kane, I have a medpack for you!
chinese: Kane 下士，我这有医疗包给你！

english: Stay put, Kane. I'm on my way!
Corporal Kane, remain there. I'll be there in a second.
chinese: Kane 下士，待在那儿。我马上就到。

english: Sorry, I'm a kinda occupied right now.
chinese: 抱歉，我这会儿有点脱不开身。

english: I can't talk right now. I'm busy.
I wish I could help you, but I can't.
You're lucky I got here when I did.
There. Back into the battle, Marine.
chinese: 好了。回战场去吧，陆战队员。

english: Enough loungin' around, Marine. Back into the fight!
chinese: 别歇着了，陆战队员。回去接着打！
我们刚损失了一名队员！
该死！他们干掉了一个陆战队员！

english: Ha! And they said the Strogg were tough!
chinese: 哈！还有人说 Strogg 难对付呢！
再给我来个 Strogg 练练枪！

english: Don't mess with the Marines, Strogg.
Thanks, Corporal. That was a close one.
Damn, that Strogg had me dead in his sights.
chinese: 好家伙，那 Strogg 的准星都咬死我了。

english: Guess I owe you one. Thanks.
chinese: 看来我欠你个人情。谢了。
那个 Strogg 算你的战果！
换我上也打不了这么漂亮！
你真是个狠角色，陆战队员！

english: Hey! Check your line of fire!
Do I look like a Strogg to you?

chinese: {furrow}妈的！你干掉了一个陆战队员！

english: Stop shootin' guys on our side!

chinese: {furrow}该死！你打死了一个陆战队员！

english: Stay put, Soldier! I'll patch you up.
chinese: 别动，大兵！我来给你包扎。

english: Don't move. I'm on my way!
Corporal Kane, hold up! I'm a medic!
chinese: Kane 下士，停一下！我是医疗兵！

english: I've got a medpack for you, Corporal Kane.
chinese: Kane 下士，我这有医疗包给你。

english: Stay at your position, Kane. I'll heal you!
Stay there, Corporal Kane. I'll have you fixed up in no time!
chinese: 待在那儿，Kane 下士。我马上就能把你治好！

english: I'm a little busy right now.
Now for a little medpack magic.
chinese: 下面轮到医疗包大显神通了。

english: Now just hold still a minute.
That's it. Time to kill more Strogg Marine.
chinese: 好了。该去多杀几个 Strogg 了，陆战队员。

english: You're healed. Back at it, Marine.
chinese: 治好了。接着干吧，陆战队员。
他们干掉了一个陆战队员！

english: Whew, I almost bought it that time.
I thought I was dead. Thanks.
chinese: 我以为自己死定了。谢了。
你可给那 Strogg 好好上了一课！

english: Watch your damn line of fire!
What the hell are you doin'?
Why the hell are you shootin' at me?
Shoot the Strogg, not our guys!
We got Strogg to the left!
Got a Strogg in my sights!
chinese: 一只 Strogg 进我准星了！

english: Remain there. I'll fix you up!
chinese: 待在原地，我来给你处理！

english: Corporal Kane, remain there! I'll heal you!
chinese: Kane 下士，待在原地！我来治疗你！

english: Wait there, Kane. I'm a medic!
chinese: 在那儿等着，Kane。我是医疗兵！

english: Don't move Corporal Kane. I've got a medpack for you!
chinese: 别动，Kane 下士，我这儿有医疗包！

english: I'm on my way, Corporal Kane!
I've got no time for talkin'.
Don't you have something else to do?
You've gotta stay out of the line of fire, Marine.
Okay, I'm done. Go frag some squibs.
chinese: 好了，处理完了。去多宰几只杂碎吧。

english: I'm done, Marine. Remember to keep low.
chinese: 好了，士兵。记得放低身子。

english: That's as much as I can do. Watch yourself, Marine.
chinese: 我只能帮你到这儿了。自己当心，士兵。

english: Corporal Kane. Wait and Ill repair your armor
chinese: Kane 下士，等一下，我来修你的护甲。

english: I can fix your armor, Kane.
Ill have you patched up in no time.
Just a few seconds and youll right back into the fight.
chinese: 就几秒钟，你马上就能重返战斗。

english: Thats all I can do. Good luck.
chinese: 我只能做到这儿了。祝你好运。

english: There. Finished. Now try to be more careful.
chinese: 好了。完工。以后小心着点。
该死！他们又干掉了一个弟兄！

english: That Squib is out of commission.

chinese: 地狱里好好待着吧，怪胎。

english: One less freak in this world.
